text_preview: NEO LAKES LOCATION === Ideally situated in the heart of Mostakbal City, the emerging hub of modern real estate developments, lies Neo Gardens. Located just 10 minutes away from Capital Cairo, and 20 minutes away from Maadi and Heliopolis.
